findings.message: Canonical points to different domain: roulettecommunity.example
findings.suggestedFix: Ensure canonical points to the correct domain

findings.message: No WebSite schema found (misses SiteLinksSearchBox opportunity)
findings.suggestedFix: Add WebSite JSON-LD with name, url, potentialAction SearchAction

findings.message: sitemap.xml does not appear to be valid XML
findings.suggestedFix: Fix sitemap generation to produce valid XML

findings.message: Heading hierarchy skips 1 level(s) (e.g., H1→H3)
findings.suggestedFix: Use sequential heading levels (H1→H2→H3) without gaps

findings.message: 6 images have empty alt text (may be intentional for decorative images)
findings.suggestedFix: Verify decorative images have role="presentation"; add alt text to content images

findings.message: No analytics script detected (Cloudflare, Plausible, or GA4)
findings.suggestedFix: Add Cloudflare Web Analytics (free, privacy-first) — add the beacon script to layout

findings.message: 18/27 images missing width/height (causes layout shift)
findings.suggestedFix: Add explicit width and height attributes to prevent CLS

findings.message: Missing og:image — links shared on social will have no preview image
findings.suggestedFix: Add og:image (1200×630px) for rich social sharing previews

findings.message: Site not served over HTTPS
findings.suggestedFix: Enable HTTPS and redirect HTTP→HTTPS

findings.message: Missing Strict-Transport-Security header
findings.suggestedFix: Add "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload"

findings.message: Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
findings.suggestedFix: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff"

findings.message: Missing clickjacking protection (X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors)
findings.suggestedFix: Add "X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN" or CSP frame-ancestors directive

findings.message: Missing Referrer-Policy header
findings.suggestedFix: Add "Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin"

findings.message: No Permissions-Policy header (optional but best practice)
findings.suggestedFix: Add Permissions-Policy to restrict camera/mic/geolocation access
